productDisplayName: Red Tape Men's Brown Casual Shoe
description: Take casual dressing to the next level with these suede boots   from red tape. The clean design coupled with high quality materials makes this pair a great choice for everyday casual wear.  Team this with jeans, tees and cargo jackets for a rugged look.Upper Suede uppers  for comfort and protection Stitch detailing and serrated edges for added style and  reinforcement Extended lace-ups for a snug Fit Brand tab attached to side of  collar Textile lining for greater comfort Midsole Padded footbed for all-day comfort PU midsole for lightweight comfort Outsole Durable rubber outsole vertically textured to offer maximum grip on smooth surfaces Heel for ergonomic fit with horizontal stripes for greater grip shoe careUse a suede brush to dust suede surfaceDo not store in direct sunlight
